---
title: "Resources"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          body {
            background: #0F2143;
            color: #ffffff;
          }
          h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6,
          .meta,
          .page-subtitle {
            color: #ffffff;
          }
          .resource-intro {
            max-width: 62ch;
            color: #dbe8ff;
            margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
          }
          .resource-intro > p {
            margin: 0;
          }
          .media-card {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
          }
          .resource-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);
          }
          .media-card a,
          .media-card a:visited {
            color: #ffffff;
            text-decoration: underline;
          }
          .media-card a:hover,
          .media-card a:focus-visible {
            color: #dbe8ff;
            text-decoration: underline;
          }
          .media-grid .meta {
            color: #D4D4D4;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            overflow: hidden;
          }
          .resource-visual {
            position: relative;
            height: 166px;
            overflow: hidden;
            isolation: isolate;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
            background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--panel-bg-a, #05070d), var(--panel-bg-b, #0f1630));
          }
          .resource-visual::before {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
            background:
              radial-gradient(circle at 18% 22%, var(--panel-glow-a, rgba(123, 97, 255, 0.3)), transparent 32%),
              radial-gradient(circle at 82% 34%, var(--panel-glow-b, rgba(255, 89, 152, 0.18)), transparent 34%),
              radial-gradient(circle at 58% 78%, var(--panel-glow-c, rgba(255, 191, 94, 0.14)), transparent 38%);
          }
          .resource-visual::after {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 0;
            opacity: 0.24;
            background:
              repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0 1px, transparent 1px 28px),
              repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) 0 1px, transparent 1px 28px);
            mask-image: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45));
          }
          .resource-visual > p {
            margin: 0;
          }
          .resource-visual-note {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0.8rem;
            left: 0.8rem;
            z-index: 4;
            color: var(--panel-note, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72));
            font-size: 0.62rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.16em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
          }
          .resource-svg {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            z-index: 1;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: visible;
            pointer-events: none;
          }
          .resource-svg path,
          .resource-svg line,
          .resource-svg polyline,
          .resource-svg rect {
            fill: none;
            stroke-linecap: round;
            stroke-linejoin: round;
            vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke;
          }
          .resource-visual-stage-label {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0.6rem;
            z-index: 4;
            color: var(--panel-note, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68));
            font-size: 0.52rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.14em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
          }
          .resource-visual-stage-label.is-left {
            left: 0.8rem;
          }
          .resource-visual-stage-label.is-center {
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
          }
          .resource-visual-stage-label.is-right {
            right: 0.8rem;
          }
          .resource-emphasis-band {
            position: absolute;
            top: 17%;
            bottom: 15%;
            left: 52%;
            width: 14%;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            border-left: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
            border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02));
          }
          .resource-bullet {
            position: absolute;
            z-index: 2;
            left: var(--x);
            top: var(--y);
            width: var(--size);
            height: var(--size);
            border-radius: 2px;
            background: var(--bullet-color);
            opacity: var(--bullet-opacity);
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04), 0 0 var(--glow) var(--bullet-color);
            animation: resourceBulletPulse var(--duration) ease-in-out infinite;
            animation-delay: var(--delay);
            pointer-events: none;
          }
          .resource-bullet.is-outline {
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid var(--bullet-color);
            box-shadow: none;
          }
          .resource-bullet.is-tile {
            border-radius: 1px;
          }
          @keyframes resourceBulletPulse {
            0%, 100% {
              opacity: var(--bullet-min-opacity);
              transform: translate(calc(-50% - var(--drift-x)), calc(-50% - var(--drift-y))) scale(0.82);
            }
            50% {
              opacity: var(--bullet-opacity);
              transform: translate(calc(-50% + var(--drift-x)), calc(-50% + var(--drift-y))) scale(1.08);
            }
          }
          @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            .resource-bullet {
              animation: none;
              transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            }
          }
          @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .resource-visual {
              height: 148px;
            }
          }
        </style>
---

<p class="page-subtitle">Data, tools, profiles and platforms.</p>

<div class="resource-intro">
Each resource opens with an animated square-based visual that hints at the underlying method or use case, rather than a generic thumbnail.
</div>

::: {.media-grid}

::: {.media-card .resource-card}

<div
  class="resource-visual"
  aria-hidden="true"
  data-scene="count"
  data-palette="#778dff,#bf7bff,#ff6f91,#ffd166"
  data-seed="11"
  style="--panel-bg-a: #05070d; --panel-bg-b: #0f1630; --panel-glow-a: rgba(106, 114, 255, 0.30); --panel-glow-b: rgba(255, 89, 152, 0.20); --panel-glow-c: rgba(255, 191, 94, 0.16);"
>
  <span class="resource-visual-note">count distribution</span>
</div>

### Count Data Modelling

<span class="meta">Methods, examples and code for modelling count outcomes.</span>

[Open website](https://fcorowe.github.io/countdata_modelling/)
:::

::: {.media-card .resource-card}

<div
  class="resource-visual"
  aria-hidden="true"
  data-scene="logistic"
  data-palette="#85b8ff,#d8ebff,#ff957d,#ff5a4f"
  data-seed="19"
  style="--panel-bg-a: #f5f7fc; --panel-bg-b: #eef3fb; --panel-glow-a: rgba(124, 180, 255, 0.18); --panel-glow-b: rgba(255, 111, 97, 0.12); --panel-glow-c: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); --panel-note: rgba(15, 33, 67, 0.72);"
>
  <span class="resource-visual-note">probability curve</span>
</div>

### Binary Logistic Regression

<span class="meta">Methods, examples and code for binary outcome modelling.</span>

[Open website](https://fcorowe.github.io/binary_logistic/)
:::

::: {.media-card .resource-card}

<div
  class="resource-visual"
  aria-hidden="true"
  data-scene="composition"
  data-palette="#38bdf8,#34d399,#fde68a,#7dd3fc"
  data-seed="23"
  style="--panel-bg-a: #031018; --panel-bg-b: #0a2230; --panel-glow-a: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.24); --panel-glow-b: rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.20); --panel-glow-c: rgba(167, 243, 208, 0.14);"
>
  <span class="resource-visual-note">migration composition</span>
</div>

### R Package CIM

<span class="meta">Code and resources for compositional impact of migration analysis in R.</span>

[Open website](post/2019-01-31-r-rmarkdown/index.html)
:::

::: {.media-card .resource-card}

<div
  class="resource-visual"
  aria-hidden="true"
  data-scene="map"
  data-palette="#1d4ed8,#38bdf8,#93c5fd,#fde047"
  data-seed="29"
  style="--panel-bg-a: #04111f; --panel-bg-b: #0c1f38; --panel-glow-a: rgba(77, 171, 247, 0.22); --panel-glow-b: rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.18); --panel-glow-c: rgba(116, 192, 252, 0.12);"
>
  <span class="resource-visual-note">tiled map</span>
</div>

### Census Mapping

<span class="meta">Interactive resources and examples for census-based spatial mapping.</span>

[Open website](https://fcorowe.github.io/census-mapping/)
:::

:::

<script>
window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const panels = [...document.querySelectorAll(".resource-visual[data-scene]")];
  if (!panels.length) return;

  const svgNamespace = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg";
  const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));

  const mulberry32 = (seed) => {
    let state = seed >>> 0;
    return () => {
      state += 0x6D2B79F5;
      let t = state;
      t = Math.imul(t ^ (t >>> 15), t | 1);
      t ^= t + Math.imul(t ^ (t >>> 7), t | 61);
      return ((t ^ (t >>> 14)) >>> 0) / 4294967296;
    };
  };

  const svgEl = (name, attributes = {}) => {
    const node = document.createElementNS(svgNamespace, name);
    Object.entries(attributes).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      node.setAttribute(key, String(value));
    });
    return node;
  };

  const createSvg = (panel) => {
    const svg = svgEl("svg", {
      class: "resource-svg",
      viewBox: "0 0 100 100",
      preserveAspectRatio: "none",
      "aria-hidden": "true"
    });
    panel.appendChild(svg);
    return svg;
  };

  const appendLine = (svg, x1, y1, x2, y2, options = {}) => {
    svg.appendChild(svgEl("line", {
      x1,
      y1,
      x2,
      y2,
      stroke: options.stroke || "rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",
      "stroke-width": options.strokeWidth || 1,
      opacity: options.opacity ?? 1,
      "stroke-dasharray": options.dasharray || ""
    }));
  };

  const appendPath = (svg, points, options = {}) => {
    const pathData = points
      .map(([x, y], index) => `${index === 0 ? "M" : "L"} ${x.toFixed(2)} ${y.toFixed(2)}`)
      .join(" ");

    svg.appendChild(svgEl("path", {
      d: pathData,
      stroke: options.stroke || "rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",
      "stroke-width": options.strokeWidth || 1.4,
      opacity: options.opacity ?? 1,
      "stroke-dasharray": options.dasharray || ""
    }));
  };

  const appendRect = (svg, x, y, width, height, options = {}) => {
    svg.appendChild(svgEl("rect", {
      x,
      y,
      width,
      height,
      rx: options.rx ?? 1.2,
      ry: options.ry ?? 1.2,
      fill: options.fill || "none",
      stroke: options.stroke || "rgba(255,255,255,0.18)",
      "stroke-width": options.strokeWidth || 0.9,
      opacity: options.opacity ?? 1
    }));
  };

  const createBullet = (panel, options, random) => {
    const bullet = document.createElement("span");
    bullet.className = "resource-bullet";

    if (options.outline) bullet.classList.add("is-outline");
    if (options.tile) bullet.classList.add("is-tile");

    bullet.style.setProperty("--x", `${options.x.toFixed(2)}%`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--y", `${options.y.toFixed(2)}%`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--size", `${options.size.toFixed(2)}px`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--bullet-color", options.color);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--bullet-opacity", `${options.opacity.toFixed(2)}`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--bullet-min-opacity", `${Math.max(0.14, options.opacity * 0.45).toFixed(2)}`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--glow", `${(options.glow ?? 10).toFixed(2)}px`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--drift-x", `${(options.driftX ?? ((random() - 0.5) * 1.8)).toFixed(2)}px`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--drift-y", `${(options.driftY ?? ((random() - 0.5) * 1.8)).toFixed(2)}px`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--duration", `${(options.duration ?? (4.2 + random() * 2.8)).toFixed(2)}s`);
    bullet.style.setProperty("--delay", `${(options.delay ?? (-random() * 5.4)).toFixed(2)}s`);

    panel.appendChild(bullet);
  };

  const createPanelLabel = (panel, text, className) => {
    const label = document.createElement("span");
    label.className = `resource-visual-stage-label ${className}`;
    label.textContent = text;
    panel.appendChild(label);
  };

  const renderCountScene = (panel, random, colors) => {
    const svg = createSvg(panel);
    const bins = [2, 4, 7, 10, 13, 11, 8, 5, 3];
    const topPoints = [];

    appendLine(svg, 12, 84, 90, 84, { stroke: "rgba(255,255,255,0.24)", strokeWidth: 0.9 });
    appendLine(svg, 12, 18, 12, 84, { stroke: "rgba(255,255,255,0.24)", strokeWidth: 0.9 });
    appendLine(svg, 51, 22, 51, 84, {
      stroke: colors[3] || colors[2] || "#ffd166",
      strokeWidth: 0.9,
      opacity: 0.35,
      dasharray: "2.2 2.2"
    });

    bins.forEach((height, index) => {
      const x = 18 + index * 7.6;
      const colorIndex = clamp(Math.round((index / (bins.length - 1)) * (colors.length - 1)), 0, colors.length - 1);
      const baseColor = colors[colorIndex] || colors[0];

      for (let row = 0; row < height; row += 1) {
        createBullet(panel, {
          x: x + (random() - 0.5) * 0.8,
          y: 79 - row * 5.1,
          size: 7.1,
          color: row === height - 1 ? (colors[3] || baseColor) : baseColor,
          opacity: 0.38 + (row / Math.max(height, 1)) * 0.46,
          glow: 10 + row * 0.8,
          driftX: (random() - 0.5) * 0.9,
          driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 0.9,
          duration: 4.6 + random() * 1.8,
          tile: true
        }, random);
      }

      topPoints.push([x, 78 - (height - 1) * 5.1 - 2.4]);
    });

    appendPath(svg, topPoints, {
      stroke: colors[1] || "#ffffff",
      strokeWidth: 1.8,
      opacity: 0.92
    });

    topPoints.forEach(([x, y], index) => {
      createBullet(panel, {
        x,
        y,
        size: 4.5,
        color: index === 4 ? (colors[3] || colors[2] || "#ffd166") : (colors[1] || "#ffffff"),
        opacity: 0.9,
        glow: 12,
        driftX: (random() - 0.5) * 0.6,
        driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 0.6,
        duration: 3.8 + random() * 1.4
      }, random);
    });

    for (let index = 0; index < 12; index += 1) {
      createBullet(panel, {
        x: 14 + random() * 74,
        y: 82 + random() * 4,
        size: 3.2 + random() * 2.2,
        color: colors[0] || "#778dff",
        opacity: 0.18 + random() * 0.16,
        glow: 6,
        driftX: (random() - 0.5) * 0.4,
        driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 0.4,
        duration: 5.4 + random() * 1.8,
        tile: true
      }, random);
    }
  };

  const renderLogisticScene = (panel, random, colors) => {
    const svg = createSvg(panel);
    const band = document.createElement("span");
    band.className = "resource-emphasis-band";
    panel.appendChild(band);

    appendLine(svg, 12, 84, 90, 84, { stroke: "rgba(15,33,67,0.22)", strokeWidth: 0.9 });
    appendLine(svg, 12, 18, 12, 84, { stroke: "rgba(15,33,67,0.22)", strokeWidth: 0.9 });

    const curvePoints = [];
    for (let step = 0; step <= 32; step += 1) {
      const x = 16 + (68 * step) / 32;
      const probability = 1 / (1 + Math.exp(-(x - 50) / 7.8));
      const y = 78 - probability * 52;
      curvePoints.push([x, y]);
    }

    appendPath(svg, curvePoints, {
      stroke: colors[2] || colors[3] || "#ff5a4f",
      strokeWidth: 1.8,
      opacity: 0.9
    });

    curvePoints.forEach(([x, y], index) => {
      if (index % 4 !== 0) return;
      createBullet(panel, {
        x,
        y,
        size: 4.3,
        color: "#ffffff",
        opacity: 0.7,
        glow: 8,
        driftX: (random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
        driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
        duration: 4 + random() * 1.4
      }, random);
    });

    for (let index = 0; index < 36; index += 1) {
      const x = 18 + random() * 66;
      const probability = 1 / (1 + Math.exp(-(x - 50) / 8));
      const positive = random() < probability;
      let y = positive ? 22 + random() * 16 : 66 + random() * 14;

      if (positive && x < 42 && random() < 0.18) y = 34 + random() * 8;
      if (!positive && x > 58 && random() < 0.18) y = 56 + random() * 8;

      createBullet(panel, {
        x,
        y,
        size: 5 + random() * 3.2,
        color: positive ? (colors[3] || colors[2] || "#ff5a4f") : (colors[0] || "#85b8ff"),
        opacity: 0.42 + random() * 0.34,
        glow: positive ? 13 : 10,
        driftX: (random() - 0.5) * 1.2,
        driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 1.2,
        duration: 4 + random() * 2.2,
        outline: random() > 0.88,
        tile: true
      }, random);
    }
  };

  const renderCompositionScene = (panel, random, colors) => {
    const svg = createSvg(panel);
    const before = [5, 4, 3];
    const after = [3, 5, 4];
    const centers = { left: 24, right: 76 };
    const rowHeight = 4.8;
    const barWidthOffsets = [-2.8, 0, 2.8];
    const beforeMidpoints = [];
    const afterMidpoints = [];

    createPanelLabel(panel, "before", "is-left");
    createPanelLabel(panel, "migration", "is-center");
    createPanelLabel(panel, "after", "is-right");

    appendRect(svg, 18.2, 22.2, 11.6, 58.2, {
      stroke: "rgba(255,255,255,0.16)",
      strokeWidth: 0.9,
      opacity: 0.9
    });
    appendRect(svg, 70.2, 22.2, 11.6, 58.2, {
      stroke: "rgba(255,255,255,0.16)",
      strokeWidth: 0.9,
      opacity: 0.9
    });
    appendLine(svg, 40, 51, 60, 51, {
      stroke: colors[3] || colors[2] || "#fde68a",
      strokeWidth: 1,
      opacity: 0.3,
      dasharray: "2.5 2.5"
    });

    const drawBar = (segments, centerX, midpointStore, mode) => {
      let rowCursor = 0;

      segments.forEach((rows, segmentIndex) => {
        const yMid = 78 - (rowCursor + (rows - 1) / 2) * rowHeight;
        midpointStore.push([centerX, yMid]);

        for (let row = 0; row < rows; row += 1) {
          const y = 78 - (rowCursor + row) * rowHeight;
          barWidthOffsets.forEach((offset, laneIndex) => {
            const sizeJitter = laneIndex === 1 ? 0.6 : 0;
            const isIncoming = mode === "after" && segmentIndex === 1 && row >= rows - 2;
            createBullet(panel, {
              x: centerX + offset + (random() - 0.5) * 0.28,
              y: y + (random() - 0.5) * 0.28,
              size: 6.8 + sizeJitter,
              color: isIncoming ? (colors[3] || colors[2] || "#fde68a") : (colors[segmentIndex] || colors[0]),
              opacity: 0.48 + segmentIndex * 0.1 + (mode === "after" ? 0.04 : 0),
              glow: isIncoming ? 15 : 9 + segmentIndex * 2.4,
              driftX: (random() - 0.5) * 0.7,
              driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 0.7,
              duration: 4.6 + random() * 1.9,
              tile: true
            }, random);
          });
        }

        rowCursor += rows;
      });
    };

    drawBar(before, centers.left, beforeMidpoints, "before");
    drawBar(after, centers.right, afterMidpoints, "after");

    beforeMidpoints.forEach(([x1, y1], segmentIndex) => {
      const [x2, y2] = afterMidpoints[segmentIndex];
      const bendX = 50;
      const bendY = (y1 + y2) / 2 + (segmentIndex - 1) * 4.4;
      const flowColor = colors[segmentIndex] || colors[0];
      const flowPoints = [[x1 + 6, y1], [bendX, bendY], [x2 - 6, y2]];

      appendPath(svg, flowPoints, {
        stroke: flowColor,
        strokeWidth: 1.35,
        opacity: 0.34
      });

      [0.2, 0.45, 0.7].forEach((t, index) => {
        const x = flowPoints[0][0] + (flowPoints[2][0] - flowPoints[0][0]) * t;
        const y = flowPoints[0][1] * (1 - t) * (1 - t)
          + 2 * (1 - t) * t * flowPoints[1][1]
          + flowPoints[2][1] * t * t;

        createBullet(panel, {
          x,
          y,
          size: 4.5 + index * 0.35,
          color: flowColor,
          opacity: 0.58 + index * 0.08,
          glow: 10 + index * 1.8,
          driftX: 0.7 + index * 0.3,
          driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
          duration: 3.8 + random() * 1.2,
          tile: true
        }, random);
      });
    });

    const migrantLaneY = [38, 47, 56];
    migrantLaneY.forEach((y, laneIndex) => {
      [0.1, 0.32, 0.56, 0.8].forEach((t) => {
        createBullet(panel, {
          x: 40 + t * 20 + (random() - 0.5) * 0.6,
          y: y + Math.sin((t + laneIndex * 0.2) * Math.PI) * 1.8,
          size: 4.1 + random() * 0.8,
          color: colors[3] || colors[2] || "#fde68a",
          opacity: 0.5 + random() * 0.18,
          glow: 11,
          driftX: 0.9,
          driftY: (random() - 0.5) * 0.35,
          duration: 3.5 + random() * 1.2,
          tile: true
        }, random);
      });
    });
  };

  const renderMapScene = (panel, random, colors) => {
    const svg = createSvg(panel);
    const outline = [
      [19, 31], [24, 19], [39, 16], [56, 22], [74, 35], [82, 49],
      [76, 67], [60, 78], [40, 75], [24, 64], [16, 49], [19, 31]
    ];
    const tiles = [
      [3, 0], [4, 0], [5, 0], [6, 0],
      [2, 1], [3, 1], [4, 1], [5, 1], [6, 1], [7, 1],
      [2, 2], [3, 2], [4, 2], [5, 2], [6, 2], [7, 2], [8, 2],
      [1, 3], [2, 3], [3, 3], [4, 3], [5, 3], [6, 3], [7, 3], [8, 3],
      [1, 4], [2, 4], [3, 4], [4, 4], [5, 4], [6, 4], [7, 4],
      [2, 5], [3, 5], [4, 5], [5, 5], [6, 5], [7, 5],
      [3, 6], [4, 6], [5, 6], [6, 6]
    ];
    const highlight = new Set(["6,3", "7,3", "6,4", "7,4", "8,3"]);

    appendPath(svg, outline, {
      stroke: colors[2] || colors[1] || "#93c5fd",
      strokeWidth: 1.1,
      opacity: 0.35
    });

    tiles.forEach(([column, row]) => {
      const x = 16 + column * 7.2;
      const y = 22 + row * 8;
      const key = `${column},${row}`;
      const isHighlight = highlight.has(key);
      const color = isHighlight
        ? (colors[3] || "#fde047")
        : (colors[Math.min(2, Math.floor(random() * 3))] || colors[0]);

      createBullet(panel, {
        x,
        y,
        size: 10.2,
        color,
        opacity: isHighlight ? 0.95 : 0.42 + row * 0.06 + random() * 0.1,
        glow: isHighlight ? 18 : 8,
        driftX: (random() - 0.5) * (isHighlight ? 0.9 : 0.4),
        driftY: (random() - 0.5) * (isHighlight ? 0.9 : 0.4),
        duration: isHighlight ? 3.8 + random() * 1.4 : 5 + random() * 1.8,
        outline: !isHighlight && random() > 0.86,
        tile: true
      }, random);
    });
  };

  panels.forEach((panel, panelIndex) => {
    const random = mulberry32(Number(panel.dataset.seed || panelIndex + 1));
    const colors = (panel.dataset.palette || "")
      .split(",")
      .map((value) => value.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
    const scene = panel.dataset.scene || "count";

    if (scene === "count") {
      renderCountScene(panel, random, colors);
    } else if (scene === "logistic") {
      renderLogisticScene(panel, random, colors);
    } else if (scene === "composition") {
      renderCompositionScene(panel, random, colors);
    } else if (scene === "map") {
      renderMapScene(panel, random, colors);
    }
  });
});
</script>
